allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',d['packages'][k].get\('version','?'\)\) for k in d['packages'] if 'emnapi' in k or 'wasi' in k]")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/dev/stdin'\); console.log\('deps:', d.dependencies\); console.log\('opt:', d.optionalDependencies\); console.log\('peer:', d.peerDependencies\); console.log\('os:', d.os\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./node_modules/@emnapi/wasi-threads/package.json'\); console.log\('deps:', JSON.stringify\(d.dependencies\)\); console.log\('opt:', JSON.stringify\(d.optionalDependencies\)\); console.log\('os:', d.os\)")
Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const k='node_modules/@napi-rs/wasm-runtime'; console.log\(l.packages[k] ? JSON.stringify\(l.packages[k], null, 2\) : 'NOT IN LOCK FILE'\)")
